implemented: package.json with Next.js 14.2.3 static export + npm scripts
next.config.mjs with output:'export', trailingSlash, unoptimized images
tsconfig.json with strict mode and App Router paths
vercel.json with outputDirectory:'out' and nextjs framework
scripts/build-card-data.mjs — Scryfall bulk data pipeline (Node.js built-ins only)
src/app/globals.css — CSS custom properties light/dark themes with MTG parchment palette
src/components/Layout.tsx — centered column 480px max-width base layout
src/app/layout.tsx — App Router root layout with metadata
src/types/card.ts — Card, CardPool, GameState, GameResult, PlayerStats TypeScript interfaces

skipped.reason: Vercel CLI not authenticated — no VERCEL_TOKEN or local auth session found
skipped.unblocked_by: Run 'npx vercel login' or set VERCEL_TOKEN environment variable, then 'npx vercel --prod'

divergences: Scryfall API requires both User-Agent AND Accept headers (not just User-Agent) — script updated accordingly
Bulk data endpoint is /bulk-data (list) not /bulk-data/oracle-cards — the oracle_cards entry is found by type filter
Scryfall serves bulk data gzip-encoded — pipeline decompresses on the fly via zlib.createGunzip()
Scryfall includes rarity:'special' for some promo/bonus-sheet cards — test and types updated to allow it
Autocomplete sort uses localeCompare (locale-aware) not simple byte comparison
mtgordle initialized as its own git repository (projects/ is gitignored in the Rouge monorepo)
factory_decisions: Used /bulk-data list endpoint and filtered by type:'oracle_cards' rather than /bulk-data/oracle-cards
Kept special rarity cards eligible for pools — they are valid playable cards
Curation uses edhrec_rank as primary signal with iconic-set and flavor-text bonuses
Cache stores decompressed JSON (not gzip) for simplicity of re-use

foundation_completion.schema_ready_note: No SQL schema needed — this is a pure static app. localStorage persistence (PlayerStats) is the data layer; types defined in src/types/card.ts
foundation_completion.auth_ready_note: No auth required per vision.json (needs_auth: false)

integrations_ready.vercel_note: vercel.json configured and build verified; deploy blocked by missing Vercel auth credentials

foundation_completion.deploy_ready_note: Build succeeds (next build + static export). Vercel deploy requires authentication.
blocking_gaps: Vercel staging deploy: Vercel CLI not authenticated. Run 'npx vercel login' then 'npx vercel --prod' from projects/mtgordle/
